title: AI Tool Landing Hero + Value Prop
summary: A conversion-focused hero section for an AI tool: headline, proof, CTAs, and mobile-first layout.
requirements: Hero with headline + one-line value prop aimed at AI founders/users.
Primary CTA (Book demo / Join waitlist) + secondary CTA (See examples / Pricing).
Mobile-first layout down to 360px with no horizontal scroll.
Accessible focus states and proper button/link semantics.
assets: Sample AI product copy + CTA variants.
acceptanceCriteria: Layout matches the reference within reasonable tolerance.
No horizontal scroll on small devices.
Accessible contrast and focus outlines present.
evaluationTips: Check readability in 5 seconds: do you instantly understand the value?
Test keyboard-only navigation and focus rings.
Validate responsive behavior and layout stability on resize.

title: AI Waitlist Page + Email Capture
summary: A waitlist landing page with email capture, strong trust signals, and great states.
requirements: Waitlist form with validation and clear success/error states.
Trust block (logos/testimonials) and a short feature list.
Accessible inputs, labels, and helper text.
assets: Suggested success/error copy for the form.
acceptanceCriteria: Form is accessible and communicates errors clearly.
No layout shifts when validation messages appear.
Component boundaries are clean and reusable.
evaluationTips: Try to submit invalid emails and confirm helpful messaging.
Check focus order and screen reader labels.
Audit spacing consistency and section hierarchy.

title: Full AI Marketing Landing (Sections + Pricing)
summary: A full marketing landing for an AI tool with sections, pricing, FAQ, and a conversion-ready layout.
requirements: Hero, feature sections, social proof, FAQ, and pricing section.
Sticky nav with active section behavior.
Conversion-ready CTAs placed across the page.
Polished mobile experience with strong spacing and readable type scale.
assets: Sample pricing tiers and FAQ content (placeholder).
acceptanceCriteria: Landing feels cohesive, premium, and conversion-focused.
Accessible headings, links, and focus states.
evaluationTips: Test scroll + navigation feel (smooth, stable, no jitter).
Validate pricing section readability and CTA clarity.
Check animation restraint: premium, not distracting.
